title: TrustLadder Stage 1 verdict-level telemetry event
$comment: Prereg v3 Sec. 7A (Amendment D): per verdict event — mechanism (hook | verifier | judge), latency, tokens, dollars, verdict. run_id + ts are harness join keys (arm is joined from records/<run_id>.json at derivation; never duplicated here to avoid contradiction surface). Measure fields (latency_ms, tokens, dollars) admit the below-floor string form "<FLOOR" (e.g. "<0.0001") per the 7A falsification handle; omission is a loosening. This file is the single source of truth for event shape: telemetry.py validates appends against it, emit_record.py validates costs.verdict_events items against it, derive.py validates reads against it.
